page.free-audit.title: Free Shopify cross-device cart audit | Persistent Cart
page.free-audit.desc: Find out for free whether your Shopify store drops signed-in carts when shoppers switch devices — what it could be costing you, and the quick wins. No install required.
page.free-audit.h1: Does your store lose carts when shoppers switch devices? We'll check — free.
page.free-audit.lede: Most merchants don't know whether their store keeps a signed-in shopper's cart across devices — and the loss is invisible in your reports. Send us your store and we'll check, estimate the impact, and point out the quick wins. No obligation, no install required.
audit.checks.title: What we'll check
audit.checks.1.title: Does a signed-in cart survive a device switch?
audit.checks.1.body: We test whether a logged-in shopper's cart follows them from phone to desktop on your store, or quietly disappears.
audit.checks.2.title: Roughly what it's costing you
audit.checks.2.body: Using your store's profile and industry benchmarks, we give a transparent, illustrative estimate of the revenue at stake — never a borrowed stat.
audit.checks.3.title: The quick wins
audit.checks.3.body: Practical, no-pressure recommendations — whether or not you ever install Persistent Cart.
audit.form.title: Request your free audit
audit.form.name: Your name
audit.form.privacy: We use these details only to prepare your audit and reply. No spam, no sharing. See our privacy approach.
audit.form.success.heading: Audit requested — thank you!
audit.form.success.body: We've got your request and will email your free cross-device cart audit within 1–2 business days. Keep an eye on your inbox.
audit.expectations: We'll email your audit within 1–2 business days. It's genuinely free and there's no obligation to install anything.
audit.trust: From the team behind Persistent Cart — Built for Shopify, helping stores since 2016.
